objective: Queue the first credible micro-live BTC5 window without forcing a bad current-session launch

gate_assessment.service_running_note: jj-live.service is inactive/stopped. jj-live and btc-5min-maker both stopped.
gate_assessment.vps_storage_note: VPS root filesystem is full. Remote runtime validation hit 'No space left on device'. No service restart is safe until disk is freed.
gate_assessment.instance1_runtime_coherent_note: Runtime truth is coherent: launch_posture=blocked, service_state=stopped, allow_order_submission=false — no contradiction. Safe blocked baseline.
gate_assessment.instance2_blockers_within_threshold_note: Multiple structural blockers remain: trailing_12_not_positive, trailing_40_not_positive, forecast_not_promote_high, package_load_pending. Instance 2 has defaulted to tighter guardrail package (max_abs_delta=0.00005) per dispatch protocol because recent 5/12/20/40 windows are all negative.
gate_assessment.session_window_note: Current time is ~16:20 ET. ET 9-11 window closed for today. Next eligible window: Wednesday March 11 09:00 ET.
gate_assessment.live_activation_reason: Service stopped + VPS storage full + trailing windows negative + package load pending. No activation conditions are met this cycle. This is a staging cycle.
gate_assessment.shadow_activation_reason: Shadow requires running service. Service cannot be safely restarted until disk is freed on VPS.

new_tighter_guardrails.rationale: Instance 2 dispatch protocol: recent 5/12/20/40 windows all negative. Default to tighter guardrail package for shadow. Delta band tightened 3x (0.00015 → 0.00005). UP ceiling lowered (0.51 → 0.48). DOWN ceiling unchanged (0.51).

disk_repair_required_first.action: Free VPS disk space before any other action
disk_repair_required_first.priority: BLOCKER — no service restart is safe while VPS is storage-blocked
operator_commands: ssh ubuntu@52.208.155.0 'sudo journalctl --vacuum-size=200M && sudo apt-get clean'

shadow_activation.deploy_command_after_disk_repair: ssh ubuntu@52.208.155.0 'sudo systemctl start btc-5min-maker && sudo systemctl status btc-5min-maker'
shadow_activation.guardrail_mode: tighter_always_on — tighter than previous open_et package, safer while short windows are negative

next_live_window.label: micro-live probe
next_live_window.condition: one clean shadow pass required (trailing_12 turns positive with tighter guardrails)
pre_window_gate_check_actions: Check finance_gate allows at minimum shadow execution

thursday_fallback.condition: If Wednesday gates do not clear

lane_bounds.rollback_policy: immediate on first loss cluster or order failure burst
lane_bounds.scale_up_blocked: no size increase beyond $5 probe during first window
lane_bounds.a6_b1: hold_no_action — kill at March 14 deadline, no compute spent here

required_outputs.candidate_delta_arr_bps_note: No activation this cycle. Expected delta from Wednesday micro-live probe if gates clear and tighter guardrails hold: +5 to +20 bps/day (bounded $5 probe, 2 max fills). Tighter guardrails reduce both upside and downside.
required_outputs.expected_improvement_velocity_delta: +1 blocker resolved per step: disk repair → service restart → shadow pass → trailing_12 positive → Wednesday probe
required_outputs.arr_confidence_score_note: Stage readiness 0.15. Short windows negative. Tighter guardrails reduce risk but cannot improve confidence score until trailing windows recover.
required_outputs.finance_gate_pass_note: Finance gate: shadow-eligible. Live treasury requires polymarket_runtime whitelist clearance (currently destination_not_whitelisted).
required_outputs.one_next_cycle_action: Free VPS disk space first (journalctl vacuum + old log cleanup). Then restart btc-5min-maker in shadow mode with tighter guardrails. Gate-check trailing_12 at Wednesday 08:00 ET before opening micro-live window.

retry_schedule.disk_repair: immediate (John action — ssh to VPS and free space)
retry_schedule.service_restart_shadow: immediately after disk repair, +10 min retry if still blocked
